byOptionId.vscode: Correct â€” a code editor like VS Code is recommended for writing HTML.
byOptionId.notepad: Incorrect â€” a plain text editor like Notepad works only for basic HTML editing. When you start working on larger projects, you will get confused by missing syntax highlighting and formatting.
byOptionId.browseronly: Incorrect â€” a browser displays HTML but doesn't let you author files effectively.
